name: Pace
oneliner: Agentic AI systems that autonomously handle insurance operations — submissions intake, claims processing, and document-heavy back-office workflows — replacing the offshore BPO layer at regulated insurers.
finserv: $10M Series A led by Sequoia Capital. Production customers include Prudential Financial, The Mutual Group, and Newfront — all regulated insurance entities.
team: CEO: Cuffe — previously co-founder of Cheer, acquired by Retool (2020). Backed by Sequoia, Bryan Schreier.
thesis: Pace is occupying the BPO replacement layer inside regulated insurance — a position with exceptional defensibility. Prudential relationship gives it direct finserv credibility.
evidence: Pace raises $10M to automate insurance operations
